steps.t: Grimbold can likely be found near the Fords of Isen. You should search around the Fords of Isen for signs of Grimbold.
Grimbold can possibly be found at the Fords of Isen, where the stones make paths across the river. You should search the Fords of Isen for Grimbold.
Grimbold can likely be found somewhere at the Fords of Isen in the far west of the Westfold. You should search for Grimold.
